theme: A Hobby You Want to Start

sentences.english: If you could start a new hobby what would it be?
sentences.korean: 새 취미를 시작할 수 있다면 무엇이겠습니까?

sentences.english: If I could start a new hobby I would choose learning to play the guitar.
sentences.korean: 새 취미를 시작할 수 있다면 기타 치는 법을 배우겠어요.

sentences.english: Music has always been a big part of my life and I listen to songs every day.
sentences.korean: 음악은 항상 내 삶의 큰 부분이었고 매일 노래를 들어요.

sentences.english: But I've never actually learned to play an instrument.
sentences.korean: 하지만 실제로 악기를 배운 적이 없어요.

sentences.english: I think the guitar is perfect because it's portable and you can play almost any genre of music with it.
sentences.korean: 기타가 완벽하다고 생각하는 이유는 휴대가 가능하고 거의 모든 장르의 음악을 연주할 수 있어서예요.

sentences.english: Also playing music is a great stress reliever and it would give me a creative outlet outside of work.
sentences.korean: 또한 음악 연주는 좋은 스트레스 해소법이고 일 밖에서 창의적 배출구를 줄 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Hobby You Want to Start
Learning from Older vs. Younger People
